About Me

Where Logic Meets
Aesthetic Intuition

I'm a Software Engineering student with a deep passion for creating interfaces that are not just functional — but genuinely beautiful and intuitive.

My work lives at the intersection of code and design. I believe great digital products deserve both technical rigor and visual poetry. From wireframes to pixel-perfect implementation, I own every stage of the design-to-development pipeline.

UI/UX Design Frontend Dev Brand Design Figma React CSS Artistry Prototyping Typography

02
Selected Work
Crafted with
Intention
01
01 — Brand + Web
CRUNCH Chips Brand
Bold, fearless brand identity and interactive landing page for a premium chips brand. Designed a dark, cinematic visual language with fiery orange accents — from an animated hero and flavor showcase to stat highlights and a conversion-focused call-to-action.
Brand + Web HTML/CSS
→
02
02 — UX/UI · Nonprofit
BBT Shoulder-Up
A youth mentorship platform website designed to connect brothers with community, purpose and growth. Structured the full user journey — from storytelling and program pages to impact metrics, events, resources and membership sign-up.
UX/UI Web Design
→
03
03 — UX Research
Refineux Usability Evaluation
End-to-end usability evaluation of an e-commerce checkout flow — identified 12 usability, accessibility and navigation issues, then refined the layout and hierarchy. Task success rate improved 24% and mis-click rate dropped 15%.
UX Research Usability Testing
→
04
04 — Graphic Design
Alba Construction — Social Post
Branded social media creative for a Calgary-based roofing company, built to communicate trust and 15 years of experience through a clean layout, bold typography and a confident navy-and-white palette.
Graphic Design Social Media
→
05
05 — UX/UI · App Concept
DigiPak — Digital Marketplace
A self-initiated concept for a localized digital marketplace app — buy and sell e-books, courses, templates and design assets with local payment support. Designed the full flow from homepage and buyer/seller sign-up to filterable browsing, as my own product idea from scratch.
UX/UI App Design
→
06
06 — Graphic Design
Olympus Home Improvement
A bold top-banner social media design for a US-based roofing and home improvement company, pairing sharp typography with a striking red-and-white palette to highlight 15 years of trusted service.
Graphic Design Social Media
→
07
07 — UI/UX · Dashboard Prototype
Nexus AI — Academic & Finance Dashboard
A self-initiated UI/UX concept for a dual-purpose dashboard — an academic assistant screen for study questions and a personal finance tracker with charts and budgeting. Designed the full interface system: sidebar navigation, dark data-dashboard visual language, input flows, chat UI and chart layouts, as a clickable high-fidelity prototype.
UI/UX Dashboard Design Prototype
→
